Visual/UI:



&nbsp;- The app doesn't resize when the window is resized, this can result in options being unable to be used on too small a screen.

&nbsp;	Recommended: In addition to straight up making it resize automatically, you could also allow users to resize the various sections of the app.

&nbsp;- "Limit: 0-99" could probably be changed to "Limit: N/A" or something of the likes.

&nbsp;- Default list size is 500 credits, whereas base TC is 700 ducats.

&nbsp;- Nowhere to view your faction rules, doesn't seem to print to pdf with the list either.

&nbsp;- In the wargear window, moving the eye icon to the right side of each item would make readability easier. Also, Having the text a little bigger (or another font) as it is currently tricky to read easily.

&nbsp;- Also in wargear, a Variant tag would be good. Also, making this a different UI visual would be nice. I would recommend a little banner widget on the top right of the item (I will try to provide example if this is unclear)

&nbsp;- I don't see a way to select a patron.



Imperium:



&nbsp;- Adeptus Astartes models are recruited with either power or terminator armour. Currently, they are not costed correctly to reflect this. Currently they are auto-including power armour in their cost, but then adding terminator armour means both terminator and power armour is equipped, giving them +40 cost. 

&nbsp;	Recommended: Allow the user to sell the power armour, but make profile invalid without one of the two armour types equipped.

&nbsp;	Recommended (Alt): Alter the profile so the user can select a tickbox of which armour is equipped, selecting one will unselect the other.



I would guess this is an issue across all factions.



&nbsp;- Similar to above, Psyker models that **must** take X amount of psychic powers need to have a flag that they are invalid without them. Example; Librarian Astartes.



&nbsp;- Black Templars can still recruit 2 vanguards, not 1. This issue repeats across subfactions.



&nbsp;- Blood Angels cannot add psychic powers from the Sanguinary Discipline (assuming this will be an issue across other subfactions).
